nasb.text: “For thus says the Lord of hosts, ‘Just as I purposed to do harm to you when your fathers provoked Me to wrath,’ says the Lord of hosts, ‘and I have not relented,

esv.text: For thus says the Lord of hosts: “As I purposed to bring disaster to you when your fathers provoked me to wrath, and I did not relent, says the Lord of hosts,

cnv.text: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘你們的列祖惹我發怒的時候，我曾定意降禍在你們身上，並沒有改變心意；

ccb.text: “万军之耶和华说，‘从前你们的祖先惹我发怒，我决定毫不留情地降祸给他们。这是万军之耶和华说的。
